name: TV D-Pad Cursor
description: A virtual mouse cursor controlled by the D-pad on Android TV, Fire TV, and TV boxes. Move with arrow keys, click with Enter, long-press Enter to open settings. Includes movement acceleration, edge scrolling, click highlighting, and page zoom.

configItems.name: Cursor speed (px/frame)
configItems.description: Normal movement speed when a direction key is held. Higher = faster cursor.

configItems.name: Accelerated speed (px/frame)
configItems.description: Speed after holding a direction key beyond the accel delay threshold.

configItems.name: Acceleration delay (frames)
configItems.description: Number of frames to hold a direction before switching to fast speed. 0 = always fast.

configItems.name: Edge scroll speed (px)
configItems.description: Pixels scrolled per tick when the cursor reaches the screen edge.

configItems.name: Edge scroll zone (px)
configItems.description: Distance from the screen border within which edge scrolling activates.

configItems.name: Idle hide delay (ms)
configItems.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before the cursor fades. 0 = never hide.

configItems.name: Highlight clickable elements on hover
configItems.description: Draws an outline around clickable elements when the cursor is over them.

configItems.name: Page zoom (%)
configItems.description: Scales the entire page. 100 = no zoom. Uses CSS transform for GeckoView compatibility.
